query: INSERT INTO subscription_tiers (name, displayName, monthlyPrice, yearlyPrice, postsPerMonth, imagesPerMonth, platformsAllowed, teamMembersAllowed, clientsAllowed, whiteLabelEnabled, analyticsEnabled, prioritySupport, features, isActive) VALUES ('basic', 'Basic', 4900, 49900, 30, 100, 2, 1, 1, false, true, false, '["property_tours","market_stats","lead_magnets"]', true), ('pro', 'Pro', 9900, 99900, 100, 500, 5, 3, 5, false, true, true, '["property_tours","market_stats","lead_magnets","cinematic_reels","blog_builder","brand_story"]', true), ('agency', 'Agency', 19900, 199900, NULL, NULL, 10, 10, 25, true, true, true, '["property_tours","market_stats","lead_magnets","cinematic_reels","blog_builder","brand_story","white_label","team_management"]', true);
